analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet simply announces a press conference following a G7 leaders' videoconference on COVID-19 with EU leaders. It is informational, without evaluative language about the EU’s success, unity, usefulness, leadership, values, or global contributions. Evaluation: EU1 (successful story) – not promoted; no mention of history, overcoming obstacles, or success claims. EU2 (EU is united) – not promoted; no explicit statement of unity or solidarity. EU3 (useful for citizens) – not promoted; no concrete EU policies or benefits to citizens are described. EU4 (avant-garde actor) – not promoted; no claim of pioneering leadership. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – not promoted; no reference to human rights or related causes. EU6 (contributes to a better world) – not promoted; while G7/ COVID-19 implies multilateral engagement, the tweet does not attribute any global contribution or role to the EU.
